protocol.name: ext_background_effect_v1
protocol.copyright: Copyright 2024 The Quickshell authors. SPDX-License-Identifier: MIT
protocol.description: This protocol lets clients attach blur regions to their wl_surfaces.

interface.name: ext_background_effect_manager_v1
interface.description: This interface allows a client to create background effect objects for a given surface.

description.summary: create a background effect object for a surface

interface.name: ext_background_effect_surface_v1
interface.description: This interface controls background effects for a surface.

request.name: set_blur_region

description.summary: set the blur region for the surface

request.description: Sets the region that should blur the content behind the surface.
